description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.3.3-jdk-8 Docker image and three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_job that runs only on the master branch and executes `mvn --batch-mode compile -Dmaven.test.skip=true -Djacoco.skip=true`; also add a build_merge_job that runs on all branches except master and tags, checks out origin/master, merges the current commit without committing, then runs the same Maven compile command. In the test stage add a test_sonar_job that runs only on master and runs `mvn --batch-mode verify org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:3.4.0.905:sonar -Dsonar.host.url=$SONAR_URL -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_LOGIN`, and a test_sonar_preview_job that runs on non‑master, non‑tag commits, checks out origin/master, merges the commit, and runs the Sonar scanner in preview mode with the appropriate -D options. In the deploy stage add a deploy_job that runs only on master and executes `mvn --batch-mode deploy -DskipTests -Djacoco.skip=true`, and a deploy_tags_job that runs only on tags and first sets the project version with `mvn --batch-mode org.codehaus.mojo:versions-maven-plugin:2.1:set -DnewVersion=$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME -DgenerateBackupPoms=false` then deploys with `mvn --batch-mode deploy -Dmaven.test.skip=true -Djacoco.skip=true -Prelease`. All jobs use the docker tag executor.
